message:
perf: optimize TSC performance (~13% faster wall clock)

- Use ReleaseFast instead of ReleaseSafe for frozen shards
- Remove -fno-vectorize/-fno-slp-vectorize/-fno-unroll-loops from QuickJS C flags
- Disable debug logging (FCLOSURE_DEBUG, dispatch log) in native_dispatch
- Gate dispatch counters behind ENABLE_DISPATCH_COUNTERS=false
- Raise GC threshold from 256KB to 256MB to reduce GC frequency
- Remove debug counter writes from hot native_node_lookup path
- Reduce codegen locals/stack arrays to actual needed size
- Conditionally emit for_of_iter_stack only when function uses for-of
- Add JS_SetDeferFree API to QuickJS patch (available but not active)

TSC benchmark: 4.03s → 3.49s wall, 3.82s → 3.42s CPU
